From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [American writer](/w/index.php?title=American_writer&redirect=no "American writer"))

"American writers" and "American authors" redirect here. For the band, see [American Authors](/wiki/American_Authors "American Authors"). For 1824–25 publication, see [American Writers](/wiki/American_Writers "American Writers"). For the 2001–02 C-SPAN series, see [American Writers: A Journey Through History](/wiki/American_Writers:_A_Journey_Through_History "American Writers: A Journey Through History").

The **Lists of American writers** include:

## United States

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lists_of_American_writers&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: United States")]

### By ethnicity

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lists_of_American_writers&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: By ethnicity")]

* [List of African-American writers](/wiki/List_of_African-American_writers "List of African-American writers")
* [List of Asian-American writers](/wiki/List_of_Asian_American_writers "List of Asian American writers")
* [List of Cuban-American writers](/wiki/List_of_Cuban_American_writers "List of Cuban American writers")
* [List of Egyptian-American writers](/wiki/List_of_Egyptian-American_writers "List of Egyptian-American writers")
* [List of Italian-American women writers](/wiki/List_of_Italian-American_women_writers "List of Italian-American women writers")
* [List of Jewish-American writers](/wiki/List_of_Jewish_American_writers "List of Jewish American writers")
* [List of Korean-American writers](/wiki/List_of_American_writers_of_Korean_descent "List of American writers of Korean descent")
* [List of Mexican-American writers](/wiki/List_of_Mexican_American_writers "List of Mexican American writers")
* [List of Puerto Rican writers](/wiki/List_of_Puerto_Rican_writers "List of Puerto Rican writers")
* [List of writers from peoples indigenous to the Americas](/wiki/List_of_writers_from_peoples_indigenous_to_the_Americas "List of writers from peoples indigenous to the Americas") (not limited to the U.S.)

### By field

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lists_of_American_writers&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: By field")]

* [List of American literary critics](/wiki/List_of_American_literary_critics "List of American literary critics")
* [List of American novelists](/wiki/List_of_American_novelists "List of American novelists")
* [List of American playwrights](/wiki/List_of_playwrights_from_the_United_States "List of playwrights from the United States")
* [List of American poets](/wiki/List_of_poets_from_the_United_States "List of poets from the United States")
* [List of American print journalists](/wiki/List_of_American_print_journalists "List of American print journalists")
* [List of American sportswriters](/wiki/List_of_American_sportswriters "List of American sportswriters")

### By region

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lists_of_American_writers&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: By region")]

* [List of Michigan writers](/wiki/List_of_Michigan_writers "List of Michigan writers")
* [List of San Francisco Bay Area writers](/wiki/List_of_San_Francisco_Bay_Area_writers "List of San Francisco Bay Area writers")
* [List of Utah writers](/wiki/List_of_Utah_writers "List of Utah writers")

## Other regions of the Americas

* [List of American expatriate writers](/wiki/List_of_American_expatriate_writers "List of American expatriate writers")
* [List of Central American writers](/wiki/List_of_Central_American_writers "List of Central American writers")
* [List of Latin American writers](/wiki/List_of_Latin_American_writers "List of Latin American writers")
* [List of writers from peoples indigenous to the Americas](/wiki/List_of_writers_from_peoples_indigenous_to_the_Americas "List of writers from peoples indigenous to the Americas") (not limited to the US)
